action.reasoning: Observation: The heuristic policy gets 0 seek_success because the robot can't navigate around walls - it just moves in straight lines. The GPS compass shows the human is 8-9m away but walls block direct navigation. Analysis: Need navmesh-based pathfinding. I can access env._sim.pathfinder and env._sim.get_agent_state(0) to get robot position/orientation and find paths around obstacles. Decision: Implement navmesh pathfinding in predict.py - get robot world position and heading from sim state, compute human world position from other_agent_gps, use pathfinder to find waypoints, navigate toward waypoints while maintaining 1-2m distance when close.
